task_completion.description: Navigate to the task creation form in SuiteCRM
task_completion.visual_evidence: The SuiteCRM web interface is visible with a 'Create Task' or 'New Task' form open.
The Subject input field contains exactly 'Prepare Proposal for Meridian Retail Group'.

task_completion.description: Set the correct Status and Priority
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Status dropdown/field is set to 'Not Started' and the Priority dropdown/field is set to 'High'.
The Start Date field contains '03/10/2025' (or '2025-03-10' depending on the UI date format).
The Due Date field contains '03/14/2025' (or '2025-03-14' depending on the UI date format).

task_completion.description: Enter the task description with required details
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Description text area contains the required text, specifically including keywords like 'discovery call', 'loyalty program', 'ROI', 'case stud', and '45,000'.
A success message indicating the task was saved, or the screen transitions to the Task Detail view showing the newly created task with the 'Prepare Proposal for Meridian Retail Group' subject.

integrity.description: Agent used the SuiteCRM graphical user interface
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show a web browser interacting with the SuiteCRM web application, not a terminal or API testing tool.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual CRM application
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface is clearly SuiteCRM and not a generic text editor, notepad, or mocked HTML page.

integrity.description: Agent did not use terminal commands to bypass the UI
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no terminal windows open showing SQL commands or scripts being executed to insert the task directly into the database.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task must be created with the following exact values: Subject: 'Prepare Proposal for Meridian Retail Group', Status: 'Not Started', Priority: 'High', Start Date: '03/10/2025' (or '2025-03-10'), Due Date: '03/14/2025' (or '2025-03-14'). The description must contain the concepts/keywords: 'discovery call', 'loyalty program', 'ROI', 'case stud', and '45,000'.
